iti71:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti71:2.1:
“Monks, I have seen beings who–endowed with bodily good conduct, verbal good conduct, & mental good conduct;
who did not revile noble ones, who held right views and undertook actions under the influence of right views–
iti71:2.2: at the break-up of the body, after death, have re-appeared in a good destination, a heavenly world.
iti71:3.1: It’s not from having heard this from another contemplative or brahman that I tell you that I have seen beings who–
iti71:3.2:
endowed with bodily good conduct, verbal good conduct, & mental good conduct;
who did not revile noble ones, who held right views and undertook actions under the influence of right views–
iti71:3.3: at the break-up of the body, after death, have re-appeared in a good destination, a heavenly world.
iti71:3.4: It’s from having known it myself, seen it myself, realized it myself that I tell you that I have seen beings who–
iti71:4.1:
endowed with bodily good conduct, verbal good conduct, & mental good conduct;
who did not revile noble ones, who held right views and undertook actions under the influence of right views–
iti71:4.2: at the break-up of the body, after death, have re-appeared in a good destination, a heavenly world.”
iti71:5.3: doing right deeds with the body:
iti71:6.1: of much learning, a doer of merit
iti71:6.3: at the break-up of the body, discerning,
